title: FPC
description: Core plugin for FG Craft plugins
body:
This is a core library plugin needed for other plugins by FN Technologies.
This plugin does nothing by itself, but gives support to other plugins that requires this plugin.
There is no documentation for side developers yet.

Projects:

  1. Manhunt Plugin
  2. Photon

You can change language of core messages in a config of the plugin.

Config:

  1. Format: field: [parameters...] (default) - description.
  2. language: [en|ru] (en) - language of core messages.
